title: frontend: SimpleTable: Fix stale defaultRowsPerPage after settings change
author: ayushmaan-16

findings.description: defaultRowsPerPage is computed inline every render. A brief comment that this is a stable primitive from settings would aid readability.
Replaces useMemo(() => value, []) anti-pattern with direct call, correctly re-synced via useEffect.
URL-reflected branch guards against resetting when perPage param is already present in URL.
